seed_instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly five sentences.
new_constraint: The email must contain three paragraphs, each consisting of at least five sentences.
instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. The email must contain exactly five sentences. The email must contain three paragraphs, each consisting of at least five sentences.
response:
Subject: Room Availability Inquiry for Next Weekend

Dear Hotel Management Team,

I am writing to you today to formally inquire about the availability of a guest room for my upcoming stay next weekend. My travel dates are flexible within that timeframe, but I would prefer to secure a reservation starting on Friday evening. I am particularly interested in a room that offers a quiet atmosphere suitable for both rest and light business work. Could you please confirm if you have any standard or deluxe rooms open during those specific nights? Your prompt response regarding your current inventory would be greatly appreciated as I finalize my travel plans.

In addition to checking availability, I would like to ask if there are any special promotions or packages currently available for weekend guests. I am open to upgrading my room if the price difference is reasonable and if it includes additional amenities like breakfast or late checkout. Please let me know if there are any specific requirements or documentation needed to secure a booking at this time. I also want to ensure that the hotel has reliable high-speed internet access, as I will be working remotely for part of my stay. Furthermore, could you provide details on your cancellation policy in case my plans need to change unexpectedly before arrival?

Thank you very much for your time and assistance in helping me find the perfect accommodation for my trip. I look forward to hearing from you soon and hope to confirm a reservation shortly. If you require any further information from my side to process this request, please do not hesitate to contact me immediately. I appreciate your dedication to providing excellent service to all your valued guests. Please feel free to reply directly to this email or call me at the number listed below if you prefer to discuss this over the phone.
